/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/softserve_task.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/softserve_task.dir/src/cpu_reference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/softserve_task.dir/src/cuda_kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/softserve_task.dir/tests/correctness.cpp.o CMakeFiles/softserve_task.dir/tests/benchmarks.cpp.o -o softserve_task   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-13.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-13.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
